title: boechera crandallii subsp. kelseyana
intro: Boechera crandallii subsp. kelseyana, also known as Kelsey's rock cress, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Boechera crandallii subsp. kelseyana include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its leaves and flowers can be consumed fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
